name: Ack-Scent
description: Shell Pink. Medium, full peony form. Average, upright growth. M-L. Deep spicy fragrance. (Japonica Kramer's Supreme' x Hybrid 'Fragrant Pink'). (U.S. 1978 - Ackerman).

name: Ack-Scent Spice
description: Deep Rose Red. Medium, anemone form to peony form. Average, dense, spreading growth. M-L. Lemon to spicy fragrance. (Japonica 'Fragrant Star' × Lutchuensis). (U.S. 1995 - Ackerman).

name: Adrianne Ila
description: Light Pink to Pale Pink. Miniature, single with notched petals. Slow, weeping growth. E. Fragrant. (Hybrid 'Snow Drop' seedling). (Aus. 1995 - M. Baker, Macleod, Vic.).

name: Allure
description: Pink variegated White. Medium, semidouble to peony form. Vigorous, spreading growth. M. Fragrant. (Japonica 'Reg Ragland' x Lutchuensis x Japonica 'Mrs. Bertha A. Harms'). (U.S. 1998 - W. and M. A. Ray, Fresno, CA).

name: Amy Maryott
description: Rose Pink. Medium to large, semidouble form; crepe petals. Average growth. E-L. Fragrant. Very cold hardy. (U.S. 1999 - Dr. Arthur A. Maryott, Gaithersburg, MD).

name: Apricot Muffin
description: Light Pink. Medium, semidouble. Vigorous, upright growth. M. Fragrant. (U.S. 1998 - W. and M.A. Ray, Fresno, CA).

name: Aroma
description: Lavender Rose. Large, semidouble with White stamens. Vigorous, compact, upright growth. Pronounced fragrance similar to an Easter lily. (U.S. 1962 - Dr. W. C. Hava, Waveland, MS).

name: Aromatica
description: Variegated Pale Pink petals, with Deep Flesh-Pink radial stripes. Large, semidouble to peony form. Slow, open growth. E-M. Fragrant. (Hybrid 'Scented Sun' × Japonica 'Kramer's Supreme'). (N.Z. 2002 - J. Finlay).

name: Ashton's Fragrant Jewel
description: Baby Pink. Miniature, single. Rounded compact growth with small leaves. Very early, fragrant and floriferous with a long blooming season. (Lutchuensis x Japonica). (U.S. 2013 - Ackerman).

name: Athena
description: White marked Deep Rose. Medium, anemone form to loose peony form with slightly wavy outer petals. Average, upright growth. M-L. Fragrant. (U.S. 1957 - Julington).

name: Autumn Fragrance
description: Light Pink. Medium, single form. Average, open, upright growth. E-M. Honeycomb fragrance. (Hybrid 'Fragrant One' x Japonica 'Scentasia'). (N.Z. 2002 - J. Finlay).

name: B. C. Goodman
description: Light Pink with Dark Pink stripes on some petals. Medium, full peony form. Vigorous, open growth. E. Distinct fragrance. (U.S. 1953 - B. C. Goodman, Pensacola, FL).

name: Barbara Mary
description: Blush Pink. Large, peony form with delicate fragrance. E-M. (Aus. 1965 - Waterhouse).

name: Bessie Dickson
description: White. Medium, anemone form. Vigorous, compact, upright growth. E. Fragrant. (U.S. 1982 - Piet and Gaeta).

name: Bow Bells
description: Rose Pink, deeper at base and in veins. Small, semidouble of funnel form. M-L. Fragrant. (Saluenensis × Japonica). (England. 1954 - Marchant, Keepers Hill Nursery).

name: Brian Anderton
description: Red Purple, shading from a mid Blue Red at the inner petal bases to much darker at tips; petals have prominent near Black venation. Medium, anemone to peony form. Average growth. M-L. Light tea like fragrance. (N.Z. 2003 - C. J. Anderton).

name: Bridal Fragrance
description: White. Large, peony form. Vigorous growth. M-L. Fragrant. (Hybrid 'Scented Sun' x Hybrid 'High Fragrance'). (N.Z. 1995 - J. Finlay).

name: Buddy
description: Pink with Purplish cast. Small, semidouble with four inside petals coming to point at tips, with other petals round at tips. Slow, bushy growth. Fragrant. (U.S. 1951 - Azalea Glen).

name: Candy Stripe
description: White striped and flecked Red. Medium, single. Compact growth. M. Fragrant. (Aus. 1965 - Waterhouse).

name: Carol's Katie
description: Pink to Rose Pink with bright Yellow anthers and White to translucent filaments. Medium, semidouble. Average, dense and open growth. M-L. The flowers are fragrant. (U.S. 2013 - Carol Comber, Pensacola, FL).

name: Carolyn Anderton
description: White flushed Pink. Medium, semidouble. Fragrant.

name: Choice Fragrance
description: Bright Pink. Medium, anemone form. Average, upright growth. E-M. Fragrant. (Japonica 'Mrs. Bertha A. Harms' seedling x Hybrid 'Salab'} x Japonica 'Erin Farmer'). (N.Z. 2002 - J. Finlay).

name: Cinnamon Cindy
description: Rose Pink with White center petaloids. Miniature, peony form, Deep cinnamon fragrance. E-M. (Japonica 'Kenyo- Tai' x Lutchuensis). (U.S. 1973 - Ackerman).

name: Cinnamon Scentsation
description: Rose Pink to White. Small, single. Average, open, spreading growth. M-L. Highly fragrant. (Sport of Hybrid 'Cinnamon Cindy'). (U.S. 1995 - Ackerman).

name: Colonial Lady
description: ('Crystal Lake'; 'Striped'; 'White Jordan's Pride'). White with Rose Red stripes and flecks. Medium, semidouble. Fragrant. (Sport of Japonica 'Herme'). (For other forms of this cultivar see 'Orchid Pink'; 'Spring Sonnet'). (U.S. 1938 - McCaskill).

name: Coolgardie Star
description: White. Miniature, anemone form to rose form double. Fragrant.

name: Covington
description: Deeper colored and twisted petaled version of Sasanqua 'Narumigata'. Medium to large, single to semidouble. Vigorous, preading growth. The flower has a musty fragrance. Named for the tow of Covington, Louisiana. (Sport of Sasanqua 'Narumigata'). (U.S. 1952 - Origin unknown).

name: Cucamonga
description: Vermillion Red. Medium to large, rose form double. Bushy growth. M-L. Fragrant. (Sport of Japonica 'Kramer's Supreme'). (U.S. 1980 - Kramer).

name: Dame Silvia
description: Bright Scarlet Pink. Medium, semidouble to anemone form. Average, upright growth. M-L. Floral, rose-like fragrance. (Hybrid 'Fragrant One' × Japonica 'Tama-no-ura'). (N.Z. 2002 - J. Finlay).

name: Daughter's Red
description: ('Nü'erhong' - Chinese Name; 'Daughter's Red Rice Wine'). Dark Pink with Yellow anthers and White filaments, Large, semidouble with veined petals. M. Very fragrant. (Hybrid 'D3[4]' × Hybrid 'Superscent'). (U.S. 2008 - John Wang, Orinda, CA).

name: Daydream Believer
description: Pure White. Medium, single. Fast, upright growth. E. Fragrant. (U.S. 2000 - Bobby Green, Green Nurseries, Fairhope, AL)

name: Debo
description: Bright Red. Medium, single. Vigorous, dense, spreading growth. E-M. Fragrant. (Japonica x Sasanqua). (U.S. 1998 - R. Bond, Dallas, TX).

name: Dr. Robert K. Cutter
description: Red veined. Large, anemone form. Average, upright growth. M-L. Fragrant. (Japonica/Saluenensis hybrid x unnamed Hybrid). (U.S. 1983 - Dr. R. K. Cutter, Berkeley, CA).

name: Drifting Scent
description: Pink. Large, peony form. Average, upright growth. M-L. Fragrant. (Japonica 'Mrs. Bertha A. Harms' x Hybrid 'Salab' x Japonica 'Look-Away'). (N.Z. 1993 - J. Finlay).

name: Eliza Lockley
description: Pink. Large, semidouble. Slow, dense, weeping growth. E-L. Slight vanilla fragrance. (Hybrid 'Margaret Waterhouse' seedling). (Aus. 1990 - C. Davidson, Wahroonga, NSW).

name: Esme Spence
description: Soft Pink. Medium, anemone form. Average, compact growth. E-M. Fragrant. (Fraterna x Japonica). (N.Z. 1977 - Mrs. E. G. Spence, Tirau).

name: Fairy Blush
description: Apple blossom with bright Pink buds. Miniature, single. Vigorous, open, upright growth. E-L. Fragrant. (Lutchuensis seedling). (N.Z. 1993 - M. Jury, North Taranaki).

name: Feathers Fragrant
description: White blushed with Pink on outer petals with Gold anthers and White filaments. Miniature, single form. Average, spreading, medium density growth. E-M. Cold Hardy. Fragrant. (C. cuspidata x C. fraterna). (U.S. 2020 - Feathers).

name: Fimbriated Fragrance
description: Tomato Red. Medium, rose form double with no obvious petaloids and stamens with bright Yellow anthers. Average, upright and dense growth. E-M. Light fragrance. (Hybrid 'Scented Sun' x Japonica 'Kramer's Supreme'). (N.Z. 1999 - J. Finlay).

name: Fragrance
description: Light Rose. Medium, peony form. Average, compact growth. Fragrant. (U.S. 1955 - Mrs. H. C. Murphy, Moultrie, GA).

name: Fragrance Of Sleeve
description: Pale Pink veined Darker Pink. Miniature, single. Average, open, upright growth. E-M. Fragrant. (Japonica x Kissi). (U.S. 1983 - Ackerman).

name: Fragrant
description: Red. Large, full peony form. Spicy fragrance. (U.S. 1955).

name: Fragrant Asia
description: Bright Pink. Medium, single form. Average, upright growth. E-M. Strong fragrance. (Hybrid 'Fragrant One' x Japonica 'Scentasia'). (N.Z. 2002 - J. Finlay).

name: Fragrant Boutonniere
description: Bright Red. Medium, peony form. Average, upright growth. M. Fragrant. (N.Z. 1991 - J. Finlay).

name: Fragrant Burgundy
description: Dark Rose Red. Medium, peony form. Average density, upright growth. M-L. Rose and clove fragrance. (Hybrid 'Fragrant One' × Yuhsienensis'). (N.Z. 2002 - J. Finlay).

name: Fragrant Cascade
description: Pale Pink. Medium, single. Average, dense, weeping growth. E-L. Fragrant. (Japonica 'Mrs. Bertha A. Harms' x 'King's Ransom' x Hybrid 'Scentuous'). (N.Z. 1993 - J. Finlay).

name: Fragrant Concubine
description: Dark Pink with Yellow anthers. Medium, loose peony to semidouble. Vigorous, upright growth, E-M. Fragrance resembling woman's face power. (Hybrid 'Salab' × Japonica 'Tiffany'). (U.S. 1999 - John Wang, Orinda, CA).

name: Fragrant Dream
description: Soft Pink. Miniature to small, single. Vigorous, willowy, upright growth. E-M. Fragrant. (Hybrid 'Tiny Princess' x Lutchuensis). (Aus. 1989 - G. Hooper, Bexley North, NSW).

name: Fragrant Drift
description: China Rose Pink. Medium, peony form. Slow, dense, upright growth. M-L. Fragrant. (Hybrid 'Scentuous' seedling). (N.Z. 1993 - J. Finlay).

name: Fragrant Fairies
description: Pale Blush Pink tinged Blush Mauve with an occasional stripe. Miniature, single with crepe and notched petals. Vigorous, upright growth. E-L. Fragrant. (Hybrid 'Snow Drop' seedling). (Aus. 1994 - M. Baker, Macleod, Vic.).

name: Fragrant Frill
description: White, Blush or Pink. Large, anemone form. Compact growth. M. Fragrant. (U.S. 1960 - E. Luce, Half Moon Bay, CA).

name: Fragrant Genesis
description: Bright Light Red. Medium, anemone to peony form. Average, upright growth. M. Light honeycomb fragrance. Japonica 'Mrs. Bertha A. Harms' x Hybrid 'Salab') × Japonica 'Tama-Ikari'] × Japonica 'Kramer's Supreme'). (N.Z. 1999 - J. Finlay).

name: Fragrant Girl
description: Shell Pink. Medium, formal double. Vigorous, upright growth. M-L. Fragrant. (U.S. 1992 - H. Hall).

name: Fragrant Jewel
description: Glowing bright Pink. Medium, rose form double to peony form. Average, upright growth. E-M. Strong carnation and clove fragrance. (Hybrid 'Fragrant One' × Japonica 'Kramer's Supreme'). (N.Z. 2002 - J. Finlay).

name: Fragrant Jonquil
description: White. Medium, anemone form resembling a jonquil. Vigorous, open growth. M. Fragrant. (U.S. 1953 - Short).

name: Fragrant Joy
description: Dark Lavender Pink. Miniature, rose form double. Average, upright growth. E-M. Fragrant. (Rusticana x Lutchuensis). (U.S. 1983 - Ackerman).

name: Fragrant Lady
description: Ivory White with Pink flush on outer petals. Large, semidouble. M-L. Fragrant. (Japonica 'Mrs. Bertha A. Harms' × Hybrid 'Salab' × Japonica 'Erin Farmer'). (N.Z. 1996 - J. Finlay).

name: Fragrant Legend
description: Bright Red. Large, peony form. Slow and spreading growth. E-M. Fragrant. (Hybrid 'Fragrant One' x Japonica 'Kramer's Supreme'). (N.Z. 2002 - J. Finlay).

name: Fragrant One
description: Light Pink with Darker Pink petal tips shading to White in center. Large, single. Average, open, spreading growth. E-L. Fragrant. (Japonica 'Mrs. Bertha A. Harms' × Hybrid 'Salab'] x Japonica Tamaikari'). (N.Z. 1998 - J. Finlay).

name: Fragrant Pathfinder
description: Deep Pink. Large, single. Average, spreading, open growth. E-M. Hay-like fragrance. (Hybrid 'Scented Sun' x Japonica 'Kramer's Supreme'). (N.Z. 1999 - J. Finlay).

name: Fragrant Pink
description: Deep Pink. Miniature, peony form. Average, spreading growth. E-L. Fragrant. (Rusticana x Lutchuensis). (U.S. 1968 - Ackerman).

name: Fragrant Pink Improved
description: Fragrant flowered polyploid variation of 'Fragrant Pink' produced by colchicine treatment. (U.S. 1975 - Ackerman).

name: Fragrant Pixies
description: Pale Pink shading to Deep Pink at outer edges. Miniature, single with notched petals. Slow, weeping growth. E. Fragrant. (Hybrid seedling). (Aus. 1995 - M. Baker, Macleod, Vic.).

name: Fragrant Ripple
description: White to very Light Pink, marked with Light Pink stripes and Darker Pink stripes. Medium, anemone form. Average, upright growth. M. Very light gardenia fragrance. (Japonica 'Mrs. Bertha A. Harms' × Hybrid 'Salab') x Japonica "Tama-Ikari'] x Japonica 'Kramer's Supreme'. (N.Z. 1999 - J. Finlay).

name: Fragrant Ruby
description: Red, darkening as flower matures. Large, peony form. Average, upright growth. E-M. Fragrant. (Hybrid 'Fragrant One' x Japonica 'Tama Glitters'). (N.Z. 2005 - J. Finlay).

name: Fragrant Star
description: White. Large, semidouble with long, narrow, upright center petals. Average, upright growth. M. Fragrant. (U.S. 1956 - B D. Colombo, Martinez, CA).

name: Fragrant Striped
description: See 'Colonial Lady'.

name: Fragrant Sweet
description: White. Medium, single. Fragrant.

name: Good Fragrance
description: Dark Orange, Red edge to a Pink center. Medium to large, semidouble form. Average growth. Fragrance suggestive of honeysuckle or raspberry. ('Fragrant One' × Yuhsienensis). (N.Z. 2001 - J. Finlay).

name: Grand Fragrance
description: Bright Deep Pink to Red. Medium to large, semidouble with a large compact central core of stamens. Average growth. M-L. Light fragrance. ([Japonica 'Mrs. Bertha A. Harms' x Hybrid 'Salab') x Hybrid 'Scentuous'| × Japonica 'Nioi-Fubuki'). (N.Z. 1999 - J. Finlay).

name: Grantham's Fragrant
description: White. Large, semidouble with notched and fluted petals. Average, upright growth. E-M. Fragrant. (U.S. 1961 - T. T. Grantham, Gulfport, MS).

name: Hallstone Spicy
description: Bright Pink. Small, peony. Upright growth. M. Spicy fragrance. (U.S. 2008 - Ken Hallstone, Lafayette, CA).

name: Hana Wabisuke
description: Rose Pink. Small, single. Medium, upright growth. E-M. Fragrant.

name: Heartwood Salute
description: White to Blush Pink. Miniature to small, unknown form. Strong, upright, open, weeping growth. E-M. Fragrant. (Saluenensis x Lutchuensis). (U.S. 1981 - Charvet).

name: Heaven Scent
description: Rose Red. Medium, peony form. Vigorous, compact growth. E-M. Fragrant. (U.S. 1951 - Mrs. M. Verfurth, Southgate, CA).

name: Heavenly Fragrance
description: Pale Pink. Medium, peony form. Average, upright growth. M. Fragrant. (U.S. 1957).

name: High Fragrance
description: Pale Ivory Pink with Deeper Pink shading at edge. Medium, peony form. Vigorous, open growth. M. Fragrant. (Japonica 'Mrs. Bertha A. Harms' × [Hybrid 'Scentuous' × Hybrid 'Salab'l). (N.Z. 1986 - J. Finlay).

name: High Noon
description: Red. Large, semidouble with large, crinkled petals dividing bright Yellow stamens into five separate groups. Average, compact, upright growth. M. Fragrant. (U.S. 1965 - L. B. Wilson, Jr., Gulfport, MS).

name: Hiraethlyn
description: Pink shading to Darker Pink. Medium, single of funnel form. Vigorous, compact, upright growth. Fragrant. (Saluenensis x Japonica). (England 1950 - Lord Aberconway, Bodnant, So. Wales).

name: Hyperscent
description: Bright Scarlet. Medium, rose form double. Slow, dense growth. E-L. Fragrant. (Japonica 'Mrs. Bertha A. Harms' × Hybrid 'Scentuous'). (N.Z. 1993 - J. Finlay).

name: I Am Fragrant
description: Pale Pink petals with curled Deeper Pink petaloids Large, anemone form. Average growth. E-M. Light fragrance. (Hybrid 'Fragrant One' × Japonica 'Kramer's Supreme'). (N.Z. 2002 - J. Finlay).

name: Ice Melted
description: Light Pink with lighter center. Medium, semidouble. Vigorous, upright growth. M. Fragrant. (Hybrid 'Scentuous' seedling). (N.Z. 1991 -J. Finlay).

name: Iced Fragrance
description: White. Large, semidouble to peony form. Slow, dense, upright growth. E-L. Fragrant. (Aus. 1990 - Mildorrie Camellias, Jasper's Brush, NSW).

name: Intoscent
description: Pink, shading from bright Pink tips to a Lighter Pink at center. Large, peony form. Vigorous, upright growth. M-L. Fragrant. (Hybrid 'Fragrant One' × Japonica 'Scentasia'). (N.Z. 2002 - J. Finlay).

name: Jim Finlay's Fragrant
description: Light Red. Medium, peony form. Average growth. E-L. Fragrant. (N.Z. 1994 - J. Finlay).

name: Jinhua's Jade Tray
description: ('Yupan Jinhua' - Chinese name). White to Light Pink or Yellowish with Green tone, edged with Pink with Yellow anthers and Yellow filaments. Large to very large, anemone to peony form; petals broad and wrinkled or serrated at the edges and waved; a large number of petaloids mixed with stamens forming a central raised ball. Vigorous, upright growth. E-L. Sweetly fragrant. (Williamsii x fragrant cultivar). (U.S. 2007 - John Wang, Orinda, CA).

name: Julie's Own
description: Light Pink with White tipped petals. Miniature, semidouble with notched and folded petals. Average, spreading growth. E- M. Fragrant. (Hybrid 'Wirlinga Princess' seedling). (Aus. 1993 - K. Brown, Mitcham, Vic.).

name: Just Peachy
description: Peach Pink to Cream with Yellow anthers and White filaments. Medium, anemone form. E-L. Fragrant. (Hybrid 'Salab' seedling). (U.S. 1998 - Don Bergamini, Martinez, CA).

name: Kerry Elizabeth
description: Very Pale Pink. Large, anemone form. Slow, spreading growth. M-L. Flower is weakly fragrant. (Hybrid 'Scented Sun' x Japonica 'Kramer's Supreme'). (N.Z. 2002 - J. Finlay).

name: Koto-No-Kaori
description: Rose Pink. Small, single. Average, upright, lacy growth. E-M. Fragrant. (Japonica Tôkai x Lutchuensis). (Japan 1977 - Kaoru Hagiya, Niigata Prefecture).

name: Kramer's Beauty
description: Vibrant Red. Medium to large, full peony form. Vigorous, compact, upright growth. M. Fragrant. (U.S. 1980 - Kramer).

name: Kramer's Delight
description: Rose Pink. Large, full peony form. Vigorous, compact, upright growth. M. Fragrant. (U.S. 1980 - Kramer).

name: Kramer's Supreme
description: Turkey Red. Large to very large, full peony form. Vigorous, compact, upright growth. M. Fragrant. (For a variation of this cultivar see 'Cucamonga'). (U.S. 1957 - Kramer).

name: Kramer's Supreme Variegated
description: Turkey Red blotched White variation of 'Kramer's Supreme'. Fragrant.

name: Liddybow
description: Soft Pink with deeper veining, and pale edges. Miniature, single. Average, spreading, upright growth. E-M. Fragrant. (Fraterna seedling). (N.Z. 1991 - J. Hansen, Waikanae).

name: Lilly Marie Nichols
description: Dark Pink with Yellow anthers and White filaments. Very large, semidouble to loose peony form. Average, upright, spreading growth. L. The bloom is fragrant. (U.S. 2016 - Hulyn Smith).

name: Lisa Beasley
description: Pink. Miniature, rose form double. Average, spreading, upright growth. L. Fragrant. (Fraterna x Japonica). (U.S. 1993 - Jernigan).

name: Little Lisa Leigh
description: Pink fading to soft Pink on outer edges. Miniature, single with notched petals. Slow, spreading, weeping growth. E- L. Fragrant. (Hybrid 'Snowdrop' seedling). (Aus. 1993 - M. Baker, MacLeod, Vic.).

name: Loraine Gloria
description: Bloom opens Light Pink and then fades to Blush Pink with White edges as it ages; each petal is Light Shell Pink at the base and gradually fades to Blush Pink towards the edges with a White border with Orange anthers and Light Yellow filaments. Miniature, loose peony form. Average, spreading, medium density growth. E-L. Fragrant. (Sport of Non-reticulata hybrid 'Fragrant Pink'). (U.S. 2021 - William Khoury, Fort Valley, GA).

name: Lu Shan Snow
description: White. Medium, single. E. Musky fragrance. Cold hardy. (U.S. 1995 - Ackerman).

name: Mandy
description: Pale Pink. Miniature, semidouble. Open, weeping growth. M- L. Fragrant. (Rosaeflora seedling). (Aus. 1984 - Sebire).

name: Marjorie's Dream
description: White. Miniature, loose peony form with notched petals. Slow, spreading, weeping growth. E-M. Fragrant. (Hybrid 'Snow Drop' seedling). (Aus. 1993 - M. Baker, Macleod, Vic.).

name: Marna
description: Bright Pink shading to Darker Pink. Medium, semidouble. Average, upright growth. E-M. Fragrant. (Japonica 'Mrs. Bertha Harms' x Hybrid 'Salut'). (U.S. 1984 - W. F. Harrison, Berkeley, CA).

name: Masterscent
description: Coral Red. Large, peony form. Average, open, upright growth. E-L. Fragrant. (Japonica 'Mrs. Bertha A. Harms' x Hybrid 'Scentuous'). (N.Z. 1993 - J. Finlay).

name: Maxiscent
description: Light Pink. Medium, semidouble to loose peony form. Average growth. E-M. Strong fragrance. (Japonica 'Mrs. Bertha A. Harms' x 'Hybrid 'Salab'] x Japonica 'Kramer's Supreme'). (N.Z. 2005 - J. Finlay).

name: Minato-No-Akebono
description: Light Pink toned Deep Pink. Miniature, single. Average, upright somewhat loose growth. E-M. Fragrant. (Japan 1981 - Masaomi Murata).

name: Minato-no-haru
description: Color: Deep peach pink. Form: Single. Size: Miniature. Bloom Season: M-L. Growth Rate: Average. Growth Characteristics: Upright, floriferous, slightly loose growth. Leaf Characteristics: Medium green. Originator: Masaome Murata. Place of Origination: Japan - Kanagawa,  Yokohama Prefecture. Year of Registration / Origination: 1987. Heritage: Japonica 'Kon-wabisuke' x Lutchuensis. Other Information: Fragrant; means 'Harbour in Spring' in English.

name: Minato-No-Haru (Harbor In Spring)
description: Deep Peach Pink. Miniature, single. Average, upright, floriferous, slightly loose growth. M-L. Fragrant. (Japonica 'Kon-wabisuke' x Lutchuensis). (Japan 1987 - Masaome Murata, Kanagawa).

name: Miss Western Hills
description: Medium Pink in the outer part, to a Light Creamy Pink at the center. Large, peony to anemone form. Vigorous, upright growth. M-L. Lightly fragrant. (Hybrid 'Fragrant One' x Japonica 'Tama-No-Ura'). (N.Z. 2002 - J. Finlay).

name: Mizuyoshi
description: Color: White with yellow anthers and yellow filaments. Form: Semidouble to full peony form. Size: Medium. Leaf Characteristics: Dark green. Originator: Kaoru Hagiya. Place of Origination: Japan - Nakakubiki-gun, Niigata Prefecture. Year of Registration / Origination: 1960. Heritage: Collected from wild. Other Information: Fragrant.

name: Momozono-Nishiki
description: Rose shaded White. Medium, semidouble with curled petals. MONDEL - Formerly Vernalis - Dark Pink at center quickly shading to a Lighter Pink with Yellow anthers and Yellow filaments. Small to medium, single with seven petals. Vigorous, upright growth. M-L. Fragrant. (Sport of Sasanqua 'Yuletide'). (U.S. 2011 - Monrovia Nurseries, Azusa, CA).

name: Nice Fragrance
description: Bright Pink shading to Deeper Pink in center. Medium to large, peony form to rose form double. Slow growth. E- M. Fragrant. (Japonica 'Mrs. Bertha A. Harms' x Hybrid 'Salab'] x Hybrid 'Scentuous'). (N.Z. 1998 - J. Finlay).

name: Nioi Fubuki (Fragrant Snow Storm)
description: White striped Rose. Medium to large, wavy single with petaloids or high crown of stamens. Vigorous, open, upright growth. M-L. Mild fragrance. (Japan 1968 - Tsugio Ôta, Kumamoto Prefecture). See Higo.

name: Nymph
description: Pale Pink flushed Ivory. Miniature, semidouble. Vigorous, spreading growth. E-L. Fragrant. (Lutchuensis × Japonica 'Helen Metson'). (N.Z. 1982 - D. G. O'Toole, Christchurch)

name: Odoratissima
description: ('La Graciola'). Rose Pink. Large, semidouble to peony form. Upright growth. M-L. Slightly fragrant. (For another form of this cultivar see 'Leverton's'). (Aus. 1866 - Guilfoyle).

name: Paddy's Perfumed
description: Pink. Small, anemone form. Average, open, spreading growth. M. Fragrant. (Japonica "Tama-Ikari' x Hybrid 'Esme Spence'). (N.Z. 1991 - J. Finlay).

name: Party Girl
description: Pink. Large, semidouble. L. Distinct fragrance. (Aus. 1962 - H. K. C. Dettmann, Wahroonga).

name: Paul Plantiveau
description: Color: Pink, very bright to the center and to the petal borders with gold anthers and white filaments. Form: Single. Size: Medium. Bloom Season: E-M. Growth Characteristics: Compact growth. Leaf Characteristics: Dull green. Originator: Clifford Parks. Place of Origination: U.S. - Chapel Hill, North Carolina. Year of Registration / Origination: 1993. Other Information: Lightly scented.

name: Perfumed Pearl
description: Pink, lighter at petal base, Lighter Pink petaloids. Medium, anemone form. Average, upright growth. E-M. Light honeycomb fragrance. (Hybrid 'Scented Sun' x Japonica 'Kramer's Supreme'). (N.Z. 1999 - J. Finlay).

name: Pete's Fragrant Pink
description: Pink with slight sheen shading to Darker Pink edges. Large, loose peony form. Average, upright growth. E-L. Fragrant. (U.S. 1994 - P. Tedesco, Felton, CA).

name: Peter Horeni
description: White with Pink outer bud petal and edge. Medium, single form with recurved petals and prominent stamens. Fragrant.

name: Pink Crepe
description: Pale Pink with slightly darker shading at outer edges. Miniature, single with crepe and notched petals. Slow, weeping growth. E- M. Fragrant. (Hybrid 'Snow Drop' seedling). (Aus. 1994 - M. Baker, Macleod, Vic.).

name: Pink Mermaid (Kingyo-Tsubaki)
description: Spinel Pink with Golden anthers and White filaments. Medium, single with six somewhat irregular petals; most leaves narrow down then flare out to three points giving a fishtail (kingyo) appearance. M-L. Fragrant. ('This plant is a sub-species of japonica - quercifolia'; 'Sometimes called Camellia japonica var. quercifolia 'Pink Mermaid'). (Canada 1994 - Introduced into North America from Japan by Piroche Plants, Pitt Meadows, British Columbia).

name: Pink Perfume
description: Watermelon Pink. Small to medium, semidouble. Average growth. M. (U.S. 1976 - Parks).

name: Pink Posy
description: Pale Pink. Miniature to small, semidouble. Average, dense, upright growth. M. Fragrant. (Hybrid "Tiny Princess' seedling). (Aus. 1995 - D. Waldon, Woodonga, Vic.).

name: Plumfield White
description: White. Medium, semidouble with wavy petals. Vigorous, compact growth. M. Slightly fragrant. (U.S. 1948 - Illges).

name: Pomo Mound
description: White. Small, single. Neat, compact growth. E-M. Slightly fragrant. (Grijsii x unknown pollen parent). (U.S. 1998 - Charvet).

name: Prime Fragrance
description: Deep Red. Medium, peony form. Average, upright growth. M-L. Fragrant. (N.Z. 1994 - J. Finlay).

name: Pristine Fragrance
description: Rose Pink. Medium, anemone form. Average, open, upright growth. E-L. Fragrant. (N.Z. 1993 - J. Finlay).

name: Quintessence
description: White with Yellow anthers and White filaments. Miniature, single. Slow, spreading growth. E-M. Fragrant. (Lutchuensis hybrid). (N.Z. 1985 - J. C. Lesnie, Wanakau).

name: Radiating Fragrance
description: Very Light Pink, with very Dark Pink sectors. Large, rose form double, variegated. Average, dense growth. M-L. Fruity fragrance. (Hybrid 'Fragrant One' x Japonica 'Scentasia'). (N.Z. 2002 - J. Finlay).

name: Salab
description: Pink. Medium, single. Vigorous, dense, compact growth. Musky fragrance. (Sasanqua 'Apple Blossom' x Saluenensis). (U.S. 1971 - Feathers).

name: Salut
description: Orchid Pink. Miniature, single. Vigorous, spreading growth. M. Fragrant. (Saluenensis × Lutchuensis). (U.S. 1981 - Stone).

name: Santa Cruz
description: Deep Pink. Medium, rose form double to formal double. Fragrant. (Hybrid 'Sylvia May' seedling). (U.S. 1957 - James).

name: Scentasia
description: Bright Red. Large, peony form. M. Fragrant. (N.Z. 1997 -J. Finlay).

name: Scented Fireglow
description: Bright Orange Red. Medium, semidouble. Average, upright growth. M-L. Fragrant. (N.Z. 1994 - J. Finlay).

name: Scented Gem
description: Fuchsia Pink with White petaloids. Miniature, anemone form. Open, upright growth. E-M. Fragrant. (Lutchuensis x Japonica 'Tinsie'). (U.S. 1983 - Domoto).

name: Scented Snow
description: White. Large, anemone. Rapid, upright growth. E. Especially sweet fragrance. (Sasanqua 'Northern Lights' x Oleifera. (U.S. 2008 - Camellia Forest, Chapel Hill, NC).

name: Scented Sun
description: White with occasional Pink stripe; sometimes sports Rose or Blush Pink. Large to very large, semidouble with upright petals. Vigorous, upright growth. M. Fragrant. (U.S. 1985 - K. Hallstone, Lafayette, CA).

name: Scented Swirl
description: Deep Pink. Large, peony form. Average, open, upright growth. M-L. Fragrant. (Hybrid 'Scentuous' × Japonica 'Kramer's Supreme'). (N.Z. 1993 - J. Finlay).

name: Scented Treasure
description: Rose Red to Wine Red. Medium, full peony form. Average, compact growth. M. Fragrant. (U.S. 1950 - Short).

name: Scentimental
description: Bright Red. Large, peony form. E. Fragrant. (N.Z. 1997 - J. Finlay).

name: Scentsation
description: Silvery Pink. Medium to large, peony form. Average, compact, upright growth. M. Fragrant. (U.S. 1967 - Nuccio's).

name: Scentuous
description: White with Pink flush on backs of petals. Small, semidouble. Average, open growth. M-L. Fragrant. (Japonica 'Tiffany' x Lutchuensis). (N.Z. 1981 - J. Finlay).

name: Scintillating Fragrance
description: Dark Pink. Medium, rose form double to peony form. Average growth. M-L. Honey and Rose fragrance. (Hybrid 'Hyperscent' × Japonica 'Tami-Ikari'). (N.Z. 2002 - J. Finlay).

name: Sekiyô (Setting Sun)
description: Bright Pink. Large, single. E. Fragrant.

name: Serenade
description: Cream White. Medium, peony form. Average, compact, upright growth. L. Fragrant. (U.S. 1957 - A. E. Johnson, Beaverton, OR).

name: Showa Wabisuke
description: (Saluenensis 'Apple Blossom'). White toned Light Pink. Small, single. Medium, upright growth. Very fragrant.

name: Shunpū
description: Funaki-en Catalogue, 1986, No.106, p.6; Yokoyama & Kirino, 1989, Nihon no Chinka, p.86, colour photo & description: Small size, faint pink, cup-shaped single with 5 petals, 3 broad, rounded, concave and 2 smaller outer petals, all overlapping, with a central stamen column, having white filaments, joined for their lower half and yellow anthers. Rather strong fragrance. Blooms mid-season to late. Leaves dull, dark green, broad-ovate, margins crennate. Plant is compact. Originated in Niigata Prefecture, Japan. Resembles Minato-no-haru.

name: Silicon Valley
description: Color: Pink with yellow anthers and white filaments. Form: Formal double to rose form double. Size: Miniature. Bloom Season: M-L. Growth Rate: Vigorous. Growth Characteristics: Upright growth. Leaf Characteristics: Medium green. Originator: Yuri Panchul. Place of Origination: U.S.  - Sunnyvale, CA. Year of Registration / Origination: 2020 - ACS Registration #3176 - first bloomed in 2014. Other Information: Fragrant.

name: Sleeping Scent
description: Deep Pink a t petal edges shading Lighter Pink toward center. Medium, semidouble. Average growth. M-L. Fragrant. (Japonica 'Mrs. Bertha A. Harms' x Hybrid 'Salab' x Japonica 'Erin Farmer'] x Japonica 'Tamaikari'). (N.Z. 1998 - J. Finlay).

name: Smooth Fragrance
description: Deep Pink with some veining of the petals Large, semidouble to peony form. Average, vigorous, dense growth. E-M. 1 minute left in chanter Light fragrance. (Hybrid 'Scented Sun' × Japonica "Tama-Ikari'). (N.Z. 1999 - J. Finlay).

name: Softly Fragrant
description: Pale Pink. Medium, peony form. Vigorous, upright growth. M-L. Light, spicy fragrance. (Hybrid 'Fragrant One' x Japonica 'Scentasia'). (N.Z. 2002 - J. Finlay).

name: Souza's Pavlova
description: Clear Pink. Medium, peony form. Average, open growth. M-L. Fragrant. (Japonica 'Nioi-Fubuki' x Hybrid 'Scentuous'). (N.Z. 1987 - J. Finlay).

name: Spring Mist
description: Blush Pink. Miniature, semidouble. Vigorous, spreading growth. E-M. Fragrant. (Japonica Snow Bell' x Lutchuensis). (U.S. 1982 - A. E. Longley and Parks).

name: Sunnyvale Carnival
description: Bicolor, White and Pink with Yellow anthers and White filaments. Medium, loose peony to semidouble form with a globular shape, especially if grown in shade. Vigorous, upright, spreading growth. M-L. Fragrant. (Sasanqua 'Kanjiro ?' × Sasanqua 'Bert Jones'). (U.S. 2020 - Yuri Panchul, Sunnyvale, CA).

name: Sunrise Serenade
description: Light Pink shading near White at the center. Medium, loose peony. Fragrant.

name: Superscent
description: Faint Blush Pink. Large, peony form. Average, open growth. M-L. Fragrant. (Hybrid × Japonica 'Spring Source'). (N.Z. 1987 - J. Finlay).

name: Sweet Bonair
description: Cream White. Medium, semidouble. Vigorous, upright growth. M. Fragrant. (U.S. 1952 - Goletto).

name: Sweet Deborah Jane
description: Outer petals are mid Pink at the edges, shading to Light Pink at center and innermost petals a Pale Creamy Pink. Large, rose form double to peony form. Average growth. M-L. Fragrant. (Hybrid 'Fragrant One' x Japonica 'Kramer's Supreme'). (N.Z. 2002 - J. Finlay).

name: Sweet Delight
description: Rose Pink. Medium, semidouble to peony form. Vigorous, loose, upright growth. M. Fragrant. (U.S. 1937 - Reeves).

name: Sweet Emily Kate
description: Light Pink shading to Pale Pink in center. Small to medium, full peony form. Slow, pendulous growth. M-L. Fragrant. (Japonica x Lutchuensis). (Aus. 1987 - R. Garnett, Beaumaris, Vic.).

name: Sweet Emma
description: White with outer petals flushed Pink. Medium to large, anemone form. E. Fragrant. (Japonica "Tamaikari' × Japonica Mrs. Bertha A. Harms' × Hybrid 'Salab'). (N.Z. 1996 - J. Finlay).

name: Sweet Scented
description: Bright Pink. Medium, semidouble form. Average growth. Fragrant, reminiscent of tea. (Japonica [Higo] 'Mikuni-no-homare' x Hybrid 'High Fragrance'). (N.Z. 2002 - J. Finlay).

name: Sweet Scentsation
description: Dark Orchid Pink edges fading to Blush Pink with White overtones with a center of a mixture of Dark Orchid Pink 1 minute left in chanter and Blush Pink with White overtones with Golden anthers and Golden filaments. Large, loose peony to semidouble with upright petals. Vigorous, upright, open growth. E-M. Very fragrant. (U.S. 2016 - Jill Read, Lucedale, MS).

name: Taffeta Tutu
description: Apricot Pink with Pink petal edges blending to Lemon Yellow at center. Large, semidouble to loose peony form with upright petals. Vigorous, upright growth. M. Fragrant. (U.S. 1959 - Dr. L. W. Fawns, Fresno, CA).

name: Tahiti
description: Bright Red. Medium, single with splayed stamens. Vigorous, upright growth. M. Fragrant. (Aus. 1959 - G. Waterhouse).

name: Takane-no-yuki (Snow on the High Peaks)
description: Color: Soft pink petals, veined deeper pink with wide, white center, with gold anthers and white filaments. Form: Single with crinkled edges. Size: Medium. Leaf Characteristics: Medium to dark green. Originator: TÃ´bei Yoshida. Place of Origination: Japan - Kiso River, ChÃ»bu. Year of Registration / Origination: 1931. Other Information: Means 'Snow on the High Peaks' in English - slightly fragrant.

name: Togetherness
description: Pale Pink shading to Deep Pink at outer petal edges. Miniature, single, with fluted and notched petals. Slow, dense, upright growth. E-M. Fragrant. (Hybrid 'Snow Drop' seedling). (Aus. 1995 - M. Baker, Macleod, Vic.).

name: Toni Finlay's Fragrant
description: Pink. Medium, anemone form. Average growth. E-M. Fragrant. (Japonica 'Mrs. Bertha A. Harms' x Hybrid 'Salab' x Japonica 'Look-Away'). (N.Z. 1994 - J. Finlay).

name: Top Fragrance
description: Deep Pink. Medium, anemone to peony form. Average, upright, dense growth. E-M. Light fragrance. ([Japonica 'Mrs. Bertha A. Harms' x Hybrid 'Salab') x Japonica Tama-Ikari] × Japonica 'Kramer's Supreme'). (N.Z. 1999 - J. Finlay).

name: Transpink
description: Soft Pink. Miniature, trumpet shaped single form. Average, dense and upright growth. M-L. Honey fragrance. (Transnokoensis seedling). (N.Z. 2004 - Haydon).

name: Vernal Breeze
description: White. Small, single. Vigorous, upright growth; the plant has long arching branches. E. Very fragrant. (Japonica × C. lutchuensis). (U.S. 2014 - Camellia Forest, Chapel Hill, NC).

name: Vernice Ann
description: Rose Pink. Large, peony form. Average, open, spreading growth. M. Fragrant. (U.S. 1975 - V. A. Meskell, San Marino, CA).

name: Weeping Maiden
description: White fading to Bluish Pink at edge. Medium, single. Fragrant.

name: Westlake Fragrant Lotus
description: (Xizi Xianghe - Chinese name). Light Pink with Yellow anthers. Small to medium, rose form double. Average, upright, spreading growth with many lateral limbs. E-M. Fragrant. [Japonica "Tama-Ikari' × Japonica 'Black Pearl') x Japonica 'Tiffany']. (U.S. 1997 - John Wang, Orinda, CA).

name: White Elf
description: White flushed Pink at margin. Miniature, single. Slow, compact, upright growth. E-L. (Pitardii/Fraterna seedling x Japonica 'Fragrant Star'). (U.S. 1986 - Ackerman).

name: White Mermaid
description: White with Golden anthers and White filaments. Medium, single with six somewhat irregular petals; most leaves narrow down then flare out to three points giving a fishtail [kingyo] appearance. M-L. Fragrant. (Sport of Japonica 'Pink Mermaid' [Kingyo- tsubaki]; 'This plant is a sub-species of japonica - quercifolia'; 'Sometimes called Camellia japonica var. quercifolia 'White Mermaid'). (Canada 1994 - Introduced into North America from Japan by Piroche Plants, Pitt Meadows, British Columbia).

name: Whiteout
description: White. Medium, anemone form with petals and petaloids mixed together. Average, spreading, open growth. E-M. Very light fragrance. (Japonica "Tama-Ikari' x Hybrid 'Superscent'). (N.Z. 1999 - J. Finlay).

name: Winter Rouge
description: Hot Pink. Medium, semidouble with rabbit ears. Vigorous, open, spreading growth. E-M. Fragrant. Cold hardy. (Oleifera x Sasanqua). (U.S. 1997 - T. Dodd Nsy., Semmes, AL).

name: Winter's Beauty
description: Shell Pink. Small, peony form. Average, dense, upright growth. E-M. Musky fragrance. Cold hardy to - 15°F. (Japonica 'Billie McCaskill' x Oleifera). (U.S. 1995 - Ackerman).

name: Xizi Xianghe
description: See 'Westlake Fragrant Lotus

name: Yummy Fragrance
description: Bright Red. Medium, peony form. Average, upright growth. E-L. Fragrant. Japonica 'Mrs. Bertha A. Harms' × (Hybrid 'Salab' seedling x Japonica 'Kramer's Supreme'). (N.Z. 1994 - J. Finlay).
